scripts.dev: pnpm clean:ports:cloud && export CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=${CARGO_BUILD_JOBS:-$(( ( $(sysctl -n hw.ncpu 2>/dev/null || nproc 2>/dev/null || echo 4) + 1 ) / 2 ))} && cargo build -p mhaol-cloud --bin mhaol-cloud && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names cloud,web,tauri --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "pnpm run app:cloud:bin" "pnpm run app:cloud:web" "pnpm run app:tauri:cloud"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:cloud && pnpm run build:rendezvous
scripts.build:cloud: pnpm --filter cloud build && cargo build --release --bin mhaol-cloud
scripts.check: pnpm -r run check && cargo check -p mhaol-cloud && cargo check -p mhaol-rendezvous
scripts.clean:ports:cloud: for p in 9898 9899; do lsof -ti:$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; pgrep -f 'mhaol-cloud worker' 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.clean:ports: for p in 9898 9899 9797 14080 14001 14002; do lsof -ti:$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; pgrep -f 'mhaol-cloud worker' 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.clean: pkill -9 -x mhaol-rendezvous 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -x mhaol-cloud-shell 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -x mhaol-cloud 2>/dev/null; pnpm clean:ports; pnpm -r run clean && cargo clean && rm -f mhaol.db mhaol.db-wal mhaol.db-shm
scripts.app:rendezvous: mkdir -p logs && set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; cargo run -p mhaol-rendezvous --bin mhaol-rendezvous 2>&1 | tee logs/rendezvous.log
scripts.app:cloud: mkdir -p logs && set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=9899 cargo run -p mhaol-cloud --bin mhaol-cloud 2>&1 | tee logs/cloud.log
scripts.app:cloud:bin: mkdir -p logs && set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=9899 ./target/debug/mhaol-cloud 2>&1 | tee logs/cloud.log
scripts.app:cloud:web: mkdir -p logs && pnpm --filter cloud dev 2>&1 | tee logs/web.log
scripts.app:player: mkdir -p logs && pnpm --filter player dev 2>&1 | tee logs/player.log
scripts.app:tauri:cloud: mkdir -p logs && cd apps/cloud/src-tauri && cargo tauri dev 2>&1 | tee ../../../logs/tauri.log
scripts.install:deps: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev libonig-dev libgstreamer1.0-dev libgstreamer-plugins-base1.0-dev libgstreamer-plugins-bad1.0-dev gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav
